mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notices n WHERE (n.target_user_id IS NULL OR n.target_user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notice_reads nr WHERE nr.notice_id = n.notice_id AND nr.user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO notice_reads (notice_id, user_id) VALUES
(#{noticeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
